overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through a futuristic urban environment. The player moves from an open sidewalk lined with orange barriers into a covered underpass with industrial aesthetics, then emerges into a bright sunlit plaza featuring a crosswalk at California Ave. The scene features cyberpunk architecture, neon signage, scattered trash, and futuristic vehicles.

events.description: approaching and entering the covered underpass area ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past orange construction barriers and vending machines

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: bright orange safety barriers lining the edge of the street
red and white automated vending machines against the building wall
large concrete overpass spanning the street ahead creating a covered walkway
tropical palm trees in large planters along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city sidewalk with bright orange construction barriers separating the pedestrian walkway from the street. The player walks past vending machines and palm trees while a futuristic car drives by on the left. The environment transitions toward a covered underpass ahead, with natural sunlight casting sharp shadows on the concrete pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with industrial ceiling

events.description: entering the shaded underpass area with significantly reduced natural light
passing accumulated trash piles and debris on the right side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered underpass toward the bright light visible at the far exit

entered.detail: scattered garbage bags and debris accumulated against the right wall
yellow and black striped safety barriers blocking off areas
industrial ventilation ducts and pipes exposed on the ceiling overhead
smooth red painted building wall with shuttered windows

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered underpass with an industrial aesthetic featuring exposed ceiling ducts and mixed lighting. The walkway is lined with trash piles on the right and yellow-black barriers. The orange construction barriers recede into the distance on the left as the player walks toward a bright exit ahead, with the overpass structure now directly overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with pedestrian crosswalk intersection

events.description: exiting the underpass into bright open plaza with intense sunlight
approaching crosswalk with pedestrians waiting and traffic light showing green

agents.ego_description: exiting the underpass into bright sunlight and approaching a crosswalk with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead toward the crosswalk
futuristic car moving through the intersection near the crosswalk

entered.detail: bold yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the ground
green street sign reading California Ave mounted on a pole
vertical traffic signal pole showing green walk indication
large red painted building facade with multiple shuttered windows
large rectangular concrete planter containing palm trees

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the underpass into a bright sunlit plaza, transitioning from the dark covered walkway to an open intersection. The scene features a prominent crosswalk with yellow stripes, a California Ave street sign, and a traffic light showing green. The red building facade dominates the left side while pedestrians and futuristic vehicles move through the intersection. The overpass structure is now visible in the distance behind the player.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sunlit city sidewalk through a dim industrial underpass and back into a bright urban plaza. It begins on a pedestrian walkway lined with orange construction barriers and palm trees, moving past vending machines as a futuristic car passes by. As the camera advances, the open sunlight gives way to the shadowed interior of a covered underpass characterized by exposed ceiling ducts, yellow-black barriers, and piles of trash. The scene then shifts as the player emerges from the darkness into the glare of a sunlit intersection, where the industrial tunnel recedes into the distance. Finally, the view opens onto a wide plaza featuring a yellow-striped crosswalk and a California Ave street sign, with a red building facade and moving traffic filling the bright cityscape.
